reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio. El personal muy atento y dispuesto para ayudar. El personal del lavado y lubricentro excelente en su trato y trabajo. Un especial reconocimiento a ellos

Excellent service. The staff was very attentive and willing to help. The car wash and lube center staff were outstanding in their customer service and work. Special recognition to them.
